creator: dima@server.ru
text:
'mail -u user1' issued by user2 opens mailbox of user2 - not of user1 as stated by man

How-To-Repeat: # mail
No mail for root
# adduser user1
...
# echo 'Hello!' | mail -s 'test' user1
# ls -l /var/mail/user1
-rw------- 1 user1 users 347 Nov 18 18:28 /var/mail/user1
# mail -u user1
No mail for user1
# mail -f /var/mail/user1
Mail version 8.1 6/6/93. Type ? for help
"/var/mail/user1": 1 message 1 new
